behavior.warning_message: CRITICAL DRIFT: .ai registry out of sync with library. Run /git sync to repair.

flapping_detection.description: Detects oscillating pass/fail/fail/pass patterns on same delta — indicates structural drift, not transient state

escalation.message: FLAPPING DETECTED: Drift status oscillated >2x in 60s on same delta. Manual investigation required before any write operations.

flapping_detection.implementation_note: Flap window tracked in .ai/logs/ledgers/evolution_ledger.jsonl — check last N entries for same node_count_delta with alternating status

reasoning_hash_policy.note: All automated drift events must carry auto-generated hash via generate_reasoning_hash(). Sentinel value is flagged as a governance warning.
